summary: Product Catalog feature testing completed. Backend APIs (13/13 tests passing) work correctly. Frontend UI functional with minor issue - URL query params (e.g., ?brand=Rotel) not pre-populating filters on page load due to Next.js client hydration behavior.

integration_issues.issue: Navigating to /products?brand=Rotel doesn't pre-filter to show only Rotel products. Shows all 217 products instead of 10 Rotel products.

tests: GET /api/catalog/series returns series list with counts
Product images accessible via GET request
Pagination returns different products on page 2
Product grid displays product cards with images - PASS
Pagination works (page 2 shows different products) - PASS
Product detail shows breadcrumb (Products > Rotel > Michi X5 S2) - PASS
Product detail shows brand, name, category tags - PASS
Enquire button opens consultation form - PASS
Related products section shows 'More from Rotel' - PASS
Brands page shows 'View Products' links on cards - PASS
/brands/rotel has 'View Rotel Products' button linking to /products?brand=Rotel - PASS
URL query param ?brand=Rotel pre-filters products - FAIL (shows 217 not 10)

action_items: FIX: /products page not reading URL query params (?brand=, ?category=, ?search=) on initial load. Requires wrapping page in Suspense boundary or using server component patterns for Next.js 14 App Router.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend /api/catalog/* endpoints well-structured with proper pagination, filtering, and error handling
Frontend needs Suspense boundary around useSearchParams() usage per Next.js 14 requirements
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testability
seed_data_creation: 217 products seeded from live site by main agent
context_for_next_testing_agent: Product catalog feature mostly working. Backend APIs fully functional. One frontend bug: URL query params (?brand=Rotel) not pre-filtering on /products page - needs Suspense wrapper for useSearchParams() in Next.js 14. Manual click filtering works fine.
features_verified: GET /api/catalog/categories returns category list with counts
GET /api/catalog/brands returns brand list with counts
GET /api/catalog/series returns series list with counts
/products page renders product grid with images and filter sidebar
/products/michi-x5-s2 detail page renders with breadcrumb, image, brand, category tags, and CTA
/brands page brand cards show 'View Products' link
/brands/rotel detail page has 'View Rotel Products' button
